DAO-YU-101

Discover your island adventure

Store Login Register

What is Dao-Yu-101?

Dao-Yu-101 is an interactive learning platform where school subjects are explored through island archipelagos.

Students travel between islands that represent topics and complete lessons inside interactive learning worlds built with Minecraft Education.

The goal of Dao-Yu-101 is to make learning more engaging, interactive, and memorable.

The Archipelago Learning System

Dao-Yu-101 organizes knowledge like an island world.

Each subject becomes an archipelago.

Inside each archipelago are islands representing learning topics.

Every island contains lessons and activities that help students understand the topic step by step.

Simple structure explanation:

Subject → Archipelago
Topic → Island
Lesson → Activities on the island

Programming Archipelago

The first learning world of Dao-Yu-101 focuses on programming fundamentals using Minecraft Education. Students learn block-based coding through interactive lessons built with Minecraft MakeCode.

Minecraft MakeCode Island

How Lessons Work

Each lesson combines different learning elements to help students understand the topic.

Lessons include:

• instructional videos
• explanations and learning material
• quizzes and multiple choice questions
• interactive tasks inside the learning world

Students follow the lesson while exploring the island environment.

Flexible Learning Access

Dao-Yu-101 offers different ways to access learning content.

Single Lessons

Students can purchase individual lessons to learn specific topics.

Subscription Access

Subscriptions unlock complete archipelagos and allow students to explore multiple topics and subjects.

This flexible system allows learners to progress at their own pace.

Frequently Asked Questions

Find answers about how Dao-Yu-101 works, how lessons are structured, and how to access learning content.
